sys_hub_flow.description: Automatically executes to check the status of the specified Tanium Action from the Tanium Action History table every 5 minutes. Update the Action History record each time a new status is detected, until either a "final" status is detected (completed, expired, failed, failed verification) or until X loops have completed.
sys_hub_flow.label_cache: [{"name":"Created_1.current.action_status","label":"Trigger➛Tanium Action History Record➛Status","reference":"","reference_display":"Status","type":"choice","base_type":"choice","parent_table_name":"x_taniu_tan_core_tan_action_history","column_name":"action_status","choices":[{"label":"-- Action History Record","reference":"x_taniu_tan_core_tan_action_history","reference_display":"Tanium Action Status","type":"object","base_type":"object","attributes":{"uiType":"object","uiTypeLabel":"Object","co_type_name":"FDACTIONSTATUS","element_mapping_provider":"com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper"}}]
sys_hub_flow.name: Update Action Status

sys_flow_record_trigger.condition: action_idISNOTEMPTY^action_idNOT LIKE-^action_statusNOT INcompleted,expired,failed,failedVerification^ORaction_status=^action_name!=Direct Connect - Open Session^action_name!=Deploy-Create Deployment

sys_variable_value.value: action_idISNOTEMPTY^action_idNOT LIKE-^action_statusNOT INcompleted,expired,failed,failedVerification^ORaction_status=^action_name!=Direct Connect - Open Session^action_name!=Deploy-Create Deployment

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_d19c87091be92910216efeee034bcbef

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Table Name
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_d19c87091be92910216efeee034bcbef

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update the Status of the Tanium Action History record that triggered this flow.

action_type.display_value: Tanium-Get Action Status by Source ID

sys_hub_flow_logic.comment: Wait for the Action to process

logic_definition.display_value: Wait for a duration of time

sys_variable_value.value: If new action status is different from Action History Status

sys_hub_flow_logic.comment: Set current loop to 0 and set the "max loops" flow variable to the value of the "x_taniu_tan_core.update_action_history_status.max_retries" system property (default value 144).
Loop until max loops is reached, or until Action Status is one of the following: completed,expired,failed,failedVerification

sys_hub_flow_variable.label: Max loops
sys_hub_flow_variable.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_variable_d19c87091be92910216efeee034bcbef

sys_hub_flow_variable.label: Current loop number
sys_hub_flow_variable.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_variable_d19c87091be92910216efeee034bcbef

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.description: Check the status of the specified Tanium Action from the Tanium Action History table every 5 minutes. Update the Action History record each time a new status is detected, until either a "final" status is detected (completed, expired, failed, failed verification) or until X loops have completed.

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.name: Tanium-Update Action Status

sys_variable_value.value: action_idISNOTEMPTY^action_idNOT LIKE-^action_statusNOT INcompleted,expired,failed,failedVerification^ORaction_status=^action_name!=Direct Connect - Open Session^action_name!=Deploy-Create Deployment

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update the Status of the Tanium Action History record that triggered this flow.

action_type.display_value: Tanium-Get Action Status by Source ID

action_type_parent.display_value: Tanium-Get Action Status by Source ID

sys_hub_flow_logic.comment: Set current loop to 0 and set the "max loops" flow variable to the value of the "x_taniu_tan_core.update_action_history_status.max_retries" system property (default value 144).
Loop until max loops is reached, or until Action Status is one of the following: completed,expired,failed,failedVerification
Wait for the Action to process

logic_definition.display_value: Wait for a duration of time

sys_variable_value.value: If new action status is different from Action History Status

sys_hub_flow_variable.label: Max loops
